titleStmt.title: SII 26.3: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 3. (A.R. No. 3 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of lands in some villages and the antarāya and other levies from them by [Rājēndra]śōḻaṉ Kēraḷaṉ alias Nishadarājaṉ for the daily expenses in the temple of the same god as occurring in No. 2 above of Poṉṉamarāpati, stated here as situated in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Rājarājappāṇḍi-nāḍu.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 147.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2Āvatu rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu rājentracoḻavaḻanāṭṭup poṉnamarāpati coḻaṉ keraḷaṉāna niṣatarājanen Ivvūr mahādevar rājentraco
ḷīśvaramuṭaiyāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum palapaṭi niman=takkāṟaṟkum kuṭutta Ūrāvatu Eṉ kāṇippaṟṟil tirumukkāṇi vaya rācanerivayalum Innā ṉāḷakkaṭava Ū takkuṭiyum Āṉainallūrum veḷāneriyum kuṭikkāṭum paṇṭitankuṭi
kkāṭum Āṉainallūr munkuḷattil piccāṇṭi kuṭikkāṭum takaivar kuḷamum Ivaiyiṟṟāl van=ta An=tarāyan=tankaṭamaiyum puncey puravum pūlāṅkuṭṭam Oppilāvalliyum nirvāttu kkallulum veṭṭivittuk kuṭutten rājentracoḻan keraḷaṉāna niṣatarā
janeṉ ponnamarāpati mahādevar rājentracoḷīsvaramuṭaiyāṟku Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyār tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiyār taccācāriyaṉ Uṭaiyānāna Āti Ācāriyaneneḻuttu panmāhesvara rakṣai . svasti ...
Digital edition of SII 26.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
